daily.today_energy: You're radiating grounded confidence today, Cap. The universe is rewarding your consistency with a subtle shift in perspective—trust what feels right in your gut, even if it doesn't make logical sense yet.
daily.love: Your vulnerability is your superpower rn. Whether you're single or coupled, letting someone see the softer side of you creates the kind of connection that actually lasts. Don't hide behind productivity.
daily.career: Your efforts from weeks ago are about to pay off in unexpected ways. Stay open to collaboration and don't dismiss ideas that seem unconventional—your pragmatic energy + someone else's creativity = magic.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Move in ways that feel nourishing rather than punishing, and hydrate more than you think you need to. Rest isn't laziness; it's maintenance.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to soften your edges, Cap. Mercury's doing its thing, stirring up conversations you've been putting off. Trust the momentum—vulnerability is actually your superpower right now.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, your person might be craving more depth. Single? Someone's noticing your lately vibe shift. Either way, lead with honesty over your usual armor. It hits different.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is *chef's kiss* this week. Ideas you've been sitting on deserve airtime. Don't wait for perfect conditions—just start and iterate. Your boss will notice the shift.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity. Think grounding routines rather than extreme overhauls. Journaling or a walk where you actually think might serve you better than your usual grind.
